title: sonchus perennis
intro: Sonchus perennis, also known as the perennial sowthistle or wild lettuce, is a biennial plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce fever and ease digestive issues. The health benefits of Sonchus perennis include its ability to promote digestion, reduce swelling and pain, and even help to lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Sonchus perennis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the plant's leaves, roots, and flowers.
